description: A request-focused Django dashboard with traffic mix, success rates, latency percentiles, ranked view tables, exceptions, and links into per-view drilldowns. Use it to find which views are driving load or user-facing errors. The dashboards were generated using [Django-mixin](https://github.com/adinhodovic/django-mixin). Open issues and create feature requests in the repository.

panels.description: Current request rate for the selected Django service, views, and methods.
panels.title: Request Volume

panels.description: Traffic split by HTTP method over the last hour.
panels.title: Request Distribution by Method [1h]

panels.description: Response split by 2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx over the last hour.
panels.title: Response Distribution by Status Class [1h]

panels.description: Top 10 views by request volume over the last hour.
panels.title: Top View Traffic Share [1h]

panels.description: Response rate by status class for the selected views and methods. Rising 4xx often indicates client/API contract issues; rising 5xx indicates service-side failures.
panels.title: Response Rate by Status Class

panels.description: Request latency percentiles across the selected views and methods. P95/P99 movement usually identifies slow endpoints before averages do.
panels.title: Request Latency

panels.description: Response status codes for API and other views (non-admin)
panels.title: API & Other Views Response Status

targets.expr:
sum(
  rate(
    django_http_responses_total_by_status_view_method_total{
      cluster="$cluster",
namespace="$namespace",
job=~"$job"
,
view=~"$view",
view!~"<unnamed view>|health_check.views.HealthCheckView|prometheus-django-metrics"
,
method=~"$method"
,
      status!~"5.*",
      view!~"admin.*",
    }[1h]
  )
) by (namespace, job, view)
/
sum(
  rate(
    django_http_responses_total_by_status_view_method_total{
      cluster="$cluster",
namespace="$namespace",
job=~"$job"
,
view=~"$view",
view!~"<unnamed view>|health_check.views.HealthCheckView|prometheus-django-metrics"
,
method=~"$method"
,
      view!~"admin.*",
    }[1h]
  )
) by (namespace, job, view)

sum(
  rate(
    django_http_responses_total_by_status_view_method_total{
      cluster="$cluster",
namespace="$namespace",
job=~"$job"
,
view=~"$view",
view!~"<unnamed view>|health_check.views.HealthCheckView|prometheus-django-metrics"
,
method=~"$method"
,
      status!~"[4-5].*",
      view!~"admin.*",
    }[1h]
  )
) by (namespace, job, view)
/
sum(
  rate(
    django_http_responses_total_by_status_view_method_total{
      cluster="$cluster",
namespace="$namespace",
job=~"$job"
,
view=~"$view",
view!~"<unnamed view>|health_check.views.HealthCheckView|prometheus-django-metrics"
,
method=~"$method"
,
      view!~"admin.*",
    }[1h]
  )
) by (namespace, job, view)
